Q9 Not checked

A live load of 30 kN/m, 6 m long moves on a simply supported girder of span 20 m. For maximum bending moment to occur at a section 12 m from right support, the distance of tail of load as measured from left support will be equal to ________ m (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 5.6
Solution

5.6 (5.50 - 5.70)

 
Q10 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statements are correct regarding Influence line diagram?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c)
The ILD for reaction, SF or BM is linear for determinate structure and combination of straight
line and curve for indeterminate structures.
For a UDL shorter than span, the maximum bending moment at any section will be when the
section divides load in same ratio as it divides the span.
For simply supported beam, ILD for BM at any section is triangular and ILD for SF is triangular.
